title: Hiring Medical Officer at LV Prasad Eye Institute

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at LV Prasad Eye Institute
jsonLd.description:
LV Prasad Eye Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LV Prasad Eye Institute:
LV Prasad Eye Institute is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LV Prasad Eye Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
